description: Wide shot down the center aisle of a large indoor cultivation facility — endless rows of plants under purple-pink LED grow lights. The 'real operating business' workhorse shot.
Wide establishing shot of an indoor grow room — blue-magenta LEDs, atmospheric haze, center aisle. Moodier cultivation establishing shot.
Wide shot, low angle looking up at modern towers — slow, aspirational push.
Medium shot, eye level — human/scene detail for warmth between data beats.
Extreme close-up, macro detail — texture/insert shot, good for transitions.
Abstract financial data — glowing teal numbers and faint charts drifting across dark glass. Premium fintech mood for valuation / data beats. No readable tickers.
Macro abstract of glowing teal data particles on dark glass with bokeh — clean fintech texture/transition insert for markets beats.
Glowing teal ascending line graph rendered as particles of light on a dark background — optimistic, clean fintech. Bull / growth beats.
Warm gold streak of light trending upward with a particle trail — dramatic, optimistic. Bull / relief / catalyst beats.
Low-angle wide establishing shot of the U.S. Capitol dome against a soft pink dawn sky — serene, authoritative. 280E / rescheduling / federal-policy beats.
Tighter low-angle push on the U.S. Capitol dome in warm golden light — federal-policy / catalyst beats (alt to capitol_dawn).
Wide interior of a premium minimalist wellness retail space — warm wood shelving, frosted glass cases, slow dolly down the aisle. No people/branding. Retail / demand beats.
Sleek modern retail interior with a checkout counter and lit display cases — upscale, no branding. Retail / sales / transactions beats.
Over-the-counter shot of a hand using a tablet POS terminal in a premium wellness store — no face, illegible screen. Sales / transactions / demand beats.
Card payment at a modern retail counter POS — hand only, no face, warm bokeh background. Sales / transactions beats (alt to checkout_flow).
Wide low-angle establishing shot of a grand neoclassical stock-exchange facade with columns and flags, bright midday light — prestigious, institutional. Uplisting / NYSE-milestone beats.
Low-angle dolly push toward the columned entrance of a neoclassical exchange building against deep blue sky — uplisting / milestone beats (alt to exchange_facade).
Slow dolly through a dim, empty cultivation facility — bare racks, switched-off grow lights, cold haze. The bear twin of canopy_push. Risk / distress / oversupply beats.
Lateral dolly through a fully abandoned, decayed grow facility — dust, debris, collapsing racks. Strong distress / bankruptcy / 'handed to creditors' beats.
Slow push-in on a wooden judge's gavel on its block in a softly lit courtroom — legal-risk beats (pending appeal, antitrust suit, back-tax).
Extreme close-up push-in on a gavel and sound block, warm courtroom bokeh — legal-risk insert (alt to gavel_courtroom).
